Dead By
Night VR

A VR survival horror game. You're alone in the dark. Build fires, craft weapons, and don't let the night take you.

Learn More

About

Stay in
the light.

DeadByNightVR drops you into a dark forest compound with nothing but your hands and whatever you can scavenge. Gather wood. Light fires. Craft defenses. Something is out there, and it's patient.

Explore a sprawling world winding forest paths, an abandoned gas station, underground bunkers. Every area has resources, and every area has risks.

Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

DeadByNightVR   Last updated: 6/12/2025

What Data We Collect

IP Address, Player Username, Player Region or Country, PlayFab Player ID.

Why We Collect This Data

To enable multiplayer services and to enforce bans and prevent abuse.

How to Delete Your Data

Please note: Deleting your data is permanent and cannot be undone.

1. Open Settings on your headset
2. Go to Storage
3. Find and select DeadByNightVR
4. Tap on Delete App Data

Data Sharing & Security

We do not sell or share your data with third-party companies. Your information is only sent to trusted backend services we use for functionality: PhotonVR and PlayFab. These services have their own secure data protection systems in place.

Your Rights & Protection

Your info will never be used against you. No refunds will be issued for current or future purchases. Asset theft, ripping game files, or copyright violations will result in action that may lead to a lawsuit.

Need Help or Have Questions?

Contact us at: feargorilladev@gmail.com
